id.description: The id that was sent in the request

frozen_until.description: Timestamp (milliseconds since the UNIX epoch) until the user will be frozen - 0 means that the user is frozen until manual reset.

mmp_group.description: Triggered mmp group, this parameter is optional (appears only for Mass Quote orders trigger)

block_rfq.description: If true, indicates that the MMP status is for Block RFQ. Block RFQ MMP status is completely separate from normal order/quote MMP status.
